title: Fixing the issue of sending on behalf of another user - wrong signature and "sent by"
excerpt: When I need to send an email on behalf of one of my team, or reply to an email in the Emails and Activities window, from another team member, it pulls in my signature, and shows as sent by ME and not them in the Emails a…

posts.author: lisajones (Lisa Jones)
posts.cookedHtml: When I need to send an email on behalf of one of my team, or reply to an email in the Emails and Activities window, from another team member, it pulls in my signature, and shows as sent by ME and not them in the Emails and Activities window. I’ve been told that this is “expected” behaviour - it’s not logical to be able to send on behalf of someone else, but it looks like it’s been sent by me.
